title: Copy That
description: Copy text from chat after someones username or copy the whole chat message including their username. Coming to Forge and NeoForge eventually
body:
# 📋 CopyThat

A lightweight, client-side utility mod for **Minecraft 1.21-1.21.10** that makes copying chat messages quick, simple, and frustration free. 

---

## ‼ What It Does

`CopyThat` adds two super useful chat copy actions:

- **Ctrl + Left Click** on a chat message → copies the **full raw message**
  - Includes username/prefix (`<CqllMeToxic>` or `CqllMeToxic:`) and message body
- **Right Click** on a chat message → copies only the **message content**
  - Automatically strips the username/prefix and copies only what was said
- Shows an **in-chat confirmation message** so you instantly know what was copied ✅

---

## 🎮 Controls

- `Ctrl + Left Click` → Copy full chat line
- `Right Click` → Copy text after username/prefix

Simple, fast, and easy.

---

## 🧪 Example

If chat shows:

`<CqllMeToxic> hello world`  
or  
`CqllMeToxic: hello world`

Then:

- `Ctrl + Left Click` copies:  
  `<CqllMeToxic> hello world` / `CqllMeToxic: hello world`
- `Right Click` copies:  
  `hello world`

---

## 💡 Why Use CopyThat?

- 🔥 **Faster sharing** of chat messages with friends, moderators, or support
- 🧾 **Useful for reports/logging** when you need exact raw lines
- ✂️ **Easy clean copy** when you only want the message text
- 🪶 **Lightweight and focused** — no bloated UI, no complicated setup
- 🧠 **Natural controls** that feel right while reading chat

---

## 🛠️ Great For

- Sending exact chat quotes in Discord
- Reporting spam/scam messages
- Copying server announcements quickly
- Saving coordinates or command replies from chat
- Keeping evidence with exact formatting when needed

---

## ✅ Compatibility

- **Minecraft:** `1.21.x`
- **Loaders:** Fabric / Forge / NeoForge
- **Side:** Client-side

---

## 📦 Installation

1. Install a supported mod loader (Fabric / Forge / NeoForge)
2. Install the correct API/dependencies for your loader (if required)
3. Drop `CopyThat` into your `mods` folder
4. Launch Minecraft and open chat 🎉

---

## 🔒 Notes

- Client-side utility only
- Does not alter server behavior
- Keeps things simple: click message -> copy to clipboard

---

## ❤️ Credits

Made by **CqllMeToxic**
